requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2

summary.en: Mauritius has British and IEC legacy infrastructure and new public EV charging specifications are expected to trend toward IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC charging and CCS2 for DC fast charging. The installed vehicle fleet is mixed because Mauritius imports many right-hand-drive used EVs from Japan and the UK, so CHAdeMO and Type 1 legacy vehicles may remain in circulation. That mixed fleet should be handled honestly in site planning, but it does not make China GB/T connectors interchangeable with IEC Type 2 / CCS2 project requirements.
summary.zh: 毛里求斯具有英制和IEC传统基础设施，新建公共电动汽车充电规格预计趋向交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流快充CCS2。由于毛里求斯大量进口来自日本和英国的右舵二手电动车，现有车辆存量较混合，CHAdeMO和Type 1传统车辆可能仍在使用。站点规划应诚实处理这种混合车队情况，但这并不意味着中国GB/T接口可与IEC Type 2 / CCS2项目要求互换。
summary.zht: 模里西斯具有英制和IEC傳統基礎設施，新建公共電動汽車充電規格預計趨向交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流快充CCS2。由於模里西斯大量進口來自日本和英國的右舵二手電動車，現有車輛存量較混合，CHAdeMO和Type 1傳統車輛可能仍在使用。站點規劃應誠實處理這種混合車隊情況，但這並不意味著中國GB/T接口可與IEC Type 2 / CCS2項目要求互換。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-3 — CCS2 DC and AC/DC vehicle couplers
IEC 61851-1 — EV conductive charging general requirements
IEC 61851-23 — DC electric vehicle supply equipment

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and China DC chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers with GB/T 27930 CAN communication. GB/T AC couplers are not IEC 62196 Type 2 because connector gender, proximity/control pilot arrangement, and mechanical details differ. GB/T DC couplers are physically and electrically incompatible with CCS2 and do not use the CCS2 communication stack.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，中国直流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器并配合GB/T 27930 CAN通信。GB/T交流耦合器不是IEC 62196 Type 2，因为接口性别、接近/控制导引布置和机械细节不同。GB/T直流耦合器与CCS2在物理和电气上不兼容，且不使用CCS2通信栈。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，中國直流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器並配合GB/T 27930 CAN通訊。GB/T交流耦合器不是IEC 62196 Type 2，因為接口性別、接近/控制導引佈置和機械細節不同。GB/T直流耦合器與CCS2在物理和電氣上不兼容，且不使用CCS2通訊棧。

gap.en: A GB/T-only charger requires hardware and firmware redesign before it can serve Type 2 / CCS2 Mauritius projects. Scope includes coupler, cable, locking device, pilot signalling, DC communication, labelling, test reports, and spare parts. Multi-standard chargers may be considered for legacy CHAdeMO or Type 1 fleet support, but adapters are not a substitute for a project-specified IEC connector design.
gap.zh: 仅支持GB/T的充电桩在服务毛里求斯Type 2 / CCS2项目之前，需要进行硬件和固件重新设计。范围包括耦合器、电缆、锁止装置、导引信号、直流通信、标签、测试报告和备件。为支持传统CHAdeMO或Type 1车辆，项目可考虑多标准充电桩，但转接器不能替代项目指定的IEC接口设计。
gap.zht: 僅支持GB/T的充電樁在服務模里西斯Type 2 / CCS2項目之前，需要進行硬體和韌體重新設計。範圍包括耦合器、電纜、鎖止裝置、導引信號、直流通訊、標籤、測試報告和備件。為支持傳統CHAdeMO或Type 1車輛，項目可考慮多標準充電樁，但轉接器不能替代項目指定的IEC接口設計。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where Type 2 / CCS2 is specified by MSB-aligned standards, CEB project documents, site owner, tender, or charge-point operator; mixed legacy fleet may require additional connector planning
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connectors and is not an IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Confirm the connector mix for the specific Mauritius site. New public infrastructure should be checked against IEC Type 2 / CCS2 expectations, while legacy CHAdeMO or Type 1 support may be a separate fleet-service decision. GB/T connectors are not plug-compatible.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应确认具体毛里求斯站点的接口组合。新建公共基础设施应按IEC Type 2 / CCS2预期核实，传统CHAdeMO或Type 1支持则可能是单独的车队服务决策。GB/T接口不能直接插接兼容。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應確認具體模里西斯站點的接口組合。新建公共基礎設施應按IEC Type 2 / CCS2預期核實，傳統CHAdeMO或Type 1支持則可能是單獨的車隊服務決策。GB/T接口不能直接插接兼容。
